GizmoTheFoxCCMod_Character.name: Gizmo
GizmoTheFoxCCMod_Character.description: An artificer from a distant realm. His cards allow <c=boldPink>attunement</c> of the four elements to brew <c=boldPink>potions</c> and perform other effects.

Add Cantrip 2.name: Add 1 of 2 Cantrips to Hand
Add Cantrip 2.description: Add 1 of 2 <c=card>cantrips</c> to your hand <c=boldPink>{{execCountString}}</c> times.

Add Cantrip 4.name: Add 1 of 4 Cantrips to Hand
Add Cantrip 4.description: Add 1 of 4 <c=card>cantrips</c> to your hand <c=boldPink>{{execCountString}}</c> times.

Add Cantrip A.name: Add 1 of 4 Cantrips A to Hand
Add Cantrip A.description: Add 1 of 4 <c=card>cantrips</c> with <c=cardtrait>A upgrade</c> to your hand <c=boldPink>{{execCountString}}</c> times.

Add Cantrip B.name: Add 1 of 4 Cantrips B to Hand
Add Cantrip B.description: Add 1 of 4 <c=card>cantrips</c> with <c=cardtrait>B upgrade</c> to your hand <c=boldPink>{{execCountString}}</c> times.

Add Cantrip Random B.name: Add Random Cantrip B to Hand
Add Cantrip Random B.description: Add <c=boldPink>{{execCountString}}</c> random <c=card>cantrips</c> with <c=cardtrait>B upgrade</c> to your hand.

Cantrip.name: Cantrip
Cantrip.description: A 0-cost card which <c=boldPink>attunes</c> a specific element and draws a card.

description.None: Add <c=card>Mana Blade (Fire)</c> and <c=card>Mana Blade (Ice)</c> to your hand.
description.A: Add <c=card>Mana Blade (Fire) A</c> and <c=card>Mana Blade (Ice) A</c> to your hand.
description.B: Add <c=card>Mana Blade (Fire) B</c> and <c=card>Mana Blade (Ice) B</c> to your hand.

description.None: Move two cards from your discard pile to your hand.
description.A: Move two cards from your discard pile to your hand.
description.B: Move two cards from your discard pile to your hand.

description.None: Gain 2 <c=status>energy</c>. Add a <c=card>Discharged Capacitor</c> to your draw pile.
description.A: Gain 2 <c=status>energy</c>. Add a <c=card>Discharged Capacitor A</c> to your  draw pile.
description.B: Gain 2 <c=status>energy</c>. Add a <c=card>Discharged Capacitor B</c> to your  draw pile.

description.None: Deal <c=redd>{{damageString}}</c> dmg. Draw 1 card for each <c=boldPink>attuned element</c>, then <c=boldPink>unattune</c>.
description.A: Deal <c=redd>{{damageString}}</c> dmg. Draw 1 card for each <c=boldPink>attuned element</c>, then <c=boldPink>unattune</c>.
description.B: Deal <c=redd>{{damageString}}</c> dmg. Add a <c=card>cantrip A</c> for each <c=boldPink>attuned element</c>, then <c=boldPink>unattune</c>.

description.None: Permanently reduce cost by 1 when drawn. <c=heal>Gain 3 max hull.</c>
description.A: Permanently reduce cost by 1 when drawn. <c=heal>Gain 3 max hull.</c>
description.B: Permanently reduce cost by 1 when drawn. <c=heal>Gain 5 max hull.</c>

description.None: Obtain a random <c=card>potion</c>. After {{numPlaysString}}, raise cost by 1 this combat.
description.A: Obtain 1 of 2 <c=card>potions</c>. After {{numPlaysString}}, raise cost by 1 this combat.
description.B: Add 3 random <c=card>potions</c> to your draw pile.

Imbued Stone Construct.name: Imbued Stone Construct
Imbued Stone Construct.description: Shoots a <c=boldPink>{{atkDmg}}</c> damage shot when a cantrip is played. <c=boldPink>Attune</c> 2 random unattuned elements when destroyed.

Absorb.name: Absorb
Absorb.description: When hit by an attack, <c=boldPink>attune</c> a random non-attuned element. <c=downside>Goes away at the start of your next turn.</c>

Attunement.name: Attunement
Attunement.description: Currently <c=boldPink>attuned</c> elements. When all elements are <c=boldPink>attuned</c>, add 1 of 3 <c=boldPink>potions</c> to your hand.

Wind Charge.name: Wind Charge
Wind Charge.description: After your next <c=boldPink>{0}</c> attacks, gain 1 <c=status>EVADE</c>. <c=downside>Goes away at the start of your next turn.</c>

AttunementCount.name: Attuned Elements
AttunementCount.description: The number of elements that are currently <c=boldPink>attuned</c>.
